markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the proposed content strategy and align on initial priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Initial Focus:** Prioritize foundational content on "Agentic AI Foundations" and "AI Workflow Orchestration" for \~8 weeks to build authority and provide immediate sales enablement.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Core Narrative:** Frame Elementum as an orchestrator that layers *on top* of existing SaaS (e.g., ServiceNow, Coupa), not a direct replacement, to build credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [**Contrarian View:** Integrate the narrative that agents are overused, expensive, and inappropriate for deterministic tasks, positioning Elementum as the solution for controlled, observable workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** A "Business Process Automation" article refresh will serve as a calibration piece to test the content pipeline and align on voice/tone before full production begins.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [**Goal:** Provide high-quality content for sales enablement and build brand visibility via SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Baseline:** A Domain Authority (DA) of 29 provides a strong foundation for ranking, but current traffic is almost entirely branded.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**Competitor Analysis:** Analyzed 3,000+ URLs from competitors (IBM, Zapier, UiPath, Glean) to identify content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
      - [**Note:** Palantir was excluded due to its lack of SEO blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Proposed Content Clusters

  - [**1. Agentic AI Foundations (Priority 1)**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Focus:** Core concepts of agentic AI.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Integrate the contrarian view on agent misuse (probabilistic nature, high cost).](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [**Sales Value:** Provide shareable assets (e.g., deterministic vs. probabilistic workflows).](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**2. AI Workflow Orchestration (Priority 2)**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Focus:** The emerging category of orchestrating AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Low global search volume (\~490/mo) → chance to own the category.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Address "agent sprawl" and failed implementations from lack of orchestration.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [**3. AI Governance**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Focus:** Executive concerns about agent control and observability.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Position Elementum as the unified platform for control, highlighting observability and zero data persistence.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**4. IT Service Management (ITSM)**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [**Focus:** AI's role in ITSM, targeting ServiceNow and ICERA.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Position Elementum as a cost-effective layer on top of existing ITSM platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**5. Procurement & Source-to-Pay Automation**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [**Focus:** AI in procurement, targeting Coupa.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Position Elementum as a layer that simplifies interaction with platforms like Coupa, adding workflow and approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [**6. Pharma & Life Sciences**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [**Focus:** AI use cases in Elementum's most important vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Use real-world examples (e.g., busy salespeople, patent cliff) to demonstrate value.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**7. Business Process Automation (BPA)**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Focus:** Capture searchers exploring automation generally.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Note:** This is the broadest and most competitive cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [**8. CRM & Sales Automation**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [**Focus:** AI in sales processes, targeting Salesforce.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [**Narrative:** Highlight the pain of ineffective AI tools in sales and showcase Elementum's rule-based workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [**9. Competitive Comparisons**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Focus:** Comparison content.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Start with direct AI workflow orchestration competitors to own the category, then expand to larger platforms (ServiceNow, Coupa) later.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [**Product Deep Dive:** A recent call with Elementum clarified product details.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [**Artifacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
      - [**Product Feature Matrix:** A source-of-truth document to ensure factual accuracy and prevent AI hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [**Writing Guidelines:** Shared in Slack for initial review.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
      - [**Proofreading Checklist:** Internal document for style consistency (e.g., contractions, em-dashes).](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Calibration Article:** A refresh of the "Business Process Automation" article will be shared early next week to test the content pipeline and align on voice/tone.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Set up to track organic search traffic and Google Analytics data.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [Includes an LLM referral page to measure clicks from generative engines.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Check That:** A GEO visibility platform in development to measure LLM citations and overall AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
      - [Share the content strategy document and writing guidelines in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
      - [Share the "Business Process Automation" calibration article early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
      - [Record a Loom video walkthrough of the Looker Dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
      - [Review the content strategy and writing guidelines, providing comments in the documents.](https://fathom.video/share/wDLUBPyddU-1sGDnNpQECiqcrqSvSYzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
